name: idea-to-production
description: A composable suite for carrying software from IDEA to PRODUCTION: a front-door / meta-layer (i2p) that introduces the whole suite and reviews across all of it, a discovery phase (market-scanner) that finds a worth-building opportunity, a refinement phase (ideator) that turns it into a build-ready IDEA package, a disciplined quality-first value conveyor (foundry) that builds it, a design studio (atelier) that makes and adversarially reviews the visuals, an arrival layer (concierge) that greets whoever opens a repo and routes them, and security and publishing companions (sentinel, pressroom). Each plugin stands alone and lights up the others automatically when installed.

plugins.name: i2p
plugins.description: The FRONT DOOR and meta-layer of the marketplace — the marketplace-level surface the six specialist plugins never had. /i2p-help browses the powers you have now, grouped by the DISCOVER ▸ IDEATE ▸ BUILD ▸ DESIGN ▸ SECURE ▸ PUBLISH value flow (listing only what is installed); /i2p-review fans out EVERY installed reviewer — code (foundry), design (atelier), rendered docs (pressroom), security (sentinel) — into ONE adversarial verdict in I2P_REVIEW.md; /i2p-check consolidates every plugin's readiness into one table; /i2p-flow maps where each plugin sits and the next command to run. Introduces itself on session start and surfaces occasional ≤25-word tips. A thin orchestrator that delegates to the specialists by capability and never re-implements them. Carries the SOLID self-improvement covenant.

plugins.name: market-scanner
plugins.description: The DISCOVERY front door of the marketplace — upstream of any code. Set a standing discovery /goal, then run /market-scan: an adversarially-challenged dialogue over a market parameter taxonomy (problem severity, demand evidence, market size, willingness-to-pay, pricing power, competition, reachability, stack-fit) that proposes, scores, validates, and NARROWS candidate opportunities, killing weak ideas early. Loop it over your goal until one candidate earns a keep verdict — the spark. Hands a validated OPPORTUNITY to the ideator plugin when installed, or emits a structured markdown opportunity brief standalone. Self-improving: downstream feedback sharpens the parameters and scoring over time.

plugins.name: ideator
plugins.displayName: IDEATOR — Refine an idea into a build-ready IDEA package
plugins.description: The REFINEMENT phase of the marketplace. Takes a validated opportunity (from market-scanner) or a raw idea you already have and refines it to knowledge-parity through an adversarially-challenged dialogue, producing the IDEA PACKAGE: precise AGENT-FACING handoff documents (idea brief, subject-matter-understanding seed, first vertical slice, and a handoff contract that satisfies FOUNDRY's discovery exit criteria) plus rich, illustrated USER-FACING documents (opportunity narrative, parameter scorecard, market/pricing/competition charts, a user-flow, and a mockup screen) rendered by capability — charts via pressroom, user-flows/mockups via atelier (design-reviewed) — when installed; degrades to markdown otherwise. Iterated with the user before hand-off, then carried to PRODUCTION by FOUNDRY. Supersedes FOUNDRY's inline ideator, which remains as a graceful-degradation fallback. Also runs /ideator:name — a marketing-grade product-naming search with a deterministic, token-free availability checker (npm/PyPI/crates/GitHub + adoption tier). Self-improving: ambiguities a downstream builder hits flow back to sharpen the question-bank and the package contract.

plugins.name: foundry
plugins.description: An opinionated, disciplined, quality-first software production system. A conveyor that carries value from IDEA to PRODUCTION across role-tuned agents and value-stations (IDEA ▶ ROADMAP ▶ PLAN ▶ EARS ▶ FEATURE ▶ TEST ▶ IMPLEMENT ▶ STORY ▶ SHIP), governed by three pillars — knowledge parity, quality-first with a performance-delta gate, and waste elimination — under an overarching token-efficiency constraint. Emits markdown; uses the sentinel and pressroom companions automatically when present.

plugins.name: sentinel
plugins.description: The pre-release security gate for any repository. Catches PII, secrets/credentials, and supply-chain risk before they ship. Runs parallel, multi-agent audits across data files, git history, source, and frontend, and consolidates them into a single severity-ranked report with a PASS / REVIEW / BLOCK verdict. Stands alone, or serves as foundry's SECURITY gate when both are installed.

plugins.name: pressroom
plugins.description: Turns project artefacts and markdown into publication-grade output: narrative articles mined from git history and docs, standalone diagrams (Graphviz + a Mermaid-native specialist covering the full diagram taxonomy, theming, and ELK), and print-quality PDFs with embedded, A4-legible figures — all held to standard by an adversarial design-reviewer (typography + data-viz canon) that critiques the rendered artefact in a convergent loop. The PUBLISHING companion foundry hands off to when richer-than-markdown output is wanted — or use it directly on any project.

plugins.name: atelier
plugins.displayName: ATELIER — Design studio & adversarial UI review
plugins.description: The DESIGN studio — a designer's workshop that both makes and critiques visual work to a commercial-grade standard. /ui-review crawls the navigable routes of any SPA (screenshot + accessibility snapshot per route) and writes a scored, prioritised critique where every finding cites a named principle; /mockup composes polished screens, wireframes, and user-flows and runs them through a convergent designer↔reviewer loop until they clear a design-fitness rubric. The reviewer is a heavyweight expert in the design canon — Gestalt, the UX laws (Fitts/Hick/Miller/Jakob), Nielsen's heuristics, Norman's emotional design, and WCAG 2.2 accessibility. Composes with foundry's frontend design-system and pressroom's graphics by capability; degrades to markdown when absent. Ships a Playwright MCP for live review.

plugins.name: concierge
plugins.displayName: CONCIERGE — Repo welcome & the idea-to-production status line
plugins.description: The ARRIVAL layer of the marketplace — it greets whoever opens a repo and offers the suite's status line. When a project ships a maintainer-authored .claude/welcome.md, a SessionStart hook injects it so the agent opens with a one-line greeting and a conversational decision tree of the handful of things people come there to do — operate the software, or evolve it — routing the user to the right command, runbook, or downstream plugin. Smart-gated: it greets only on a vague/cold open and steps aside the moment the user states a concrete task, so it never nags. When a repo has no welcome yet, a second SessionStart hook makes a single, smart-gated, in-the-know offer to author one (tailored from the repo's CLAUDE.md/README — and the product's emergent artifacts under an active lifecycle — so it is specific, not bland; re-offered on cold opens until accepted or declined, with a global opt-out), and under an active idea-to-production lifecycle the welcome is managed — stamped with its phase and auto-refreshed as the product emerges, so whoever opens the repo always meets a current front door. /concierge:define-welcome authors and refreshes that welcome by reading the repo. CONCIERGE also ships the idea-to-production STATUS LINE: /concierge:statusline turns on a rich two-line ANSI bar (context & rate-limit gauges, the product-lifecycle phase, a ⚔ reviewer-catch tally), and makes a single unobtrusive offer on first activation. The engine ships in the marketplace; welcome content stays repo-local, exactly like CLAUDE.md. Stands alone; lights up ideator and foundry as the 'evolve the software' destinations when installed.

plugins.name: mission-control
plugins.description: The OPERATE phase owner — what runs a mission AFTER launch. MISSION-CONTROL keeps the live product alive and improving: it verifies operational readiness at go-live, instruments and watches the four golden signals (observability), runs incident response (severity, incident-command roles, mitigate-first, runbooks, blameless postmortems), keeps a maintenance cadence (dependency upkeep + CVE patching + tech-debt), and closes the build-measure-learn loop by turning production signals into a new opportunity that re-enters DISCOVER (the cyclic re-entry). /operate-gate is the front door — an operational-readiness check at go-live and the steady-state health view with a READY / WATCH / NOT-READY verdict. Grounded in named canon (SRE SLIs/SLOs/error budgets + golden signals, the Incident Command System, build-measure-learn, ITIL-lite). Stands alone on any live project, or advances the idea-to-production lifecycle OPERATE → DISCOVER (↻) when i2p is installed. Composes sentinel's dependency-audit and hands new opportunities to market-scanner/ideator by capability. Carries the SOLID self-improvement covenant: every incident becomes a runbook, every alert gap becomes an SLO.
